channel.title: Policy & Security Think Tank Updates
channel.description: Custom RSS feed from CSIS, CFR, and other policy institutions

item.title: Fortifying the Guatemala-Taiwan Partnership for Development
item.description: CSIS Americas Program Director Ryan C. Berg and Henry Ziemer analyze options for strengthening Guatemala-Taiwan cooperation on development.

item.title: Building Cooperative Frameworks for Subsea Cable Security in the Indo-Pacific
item.description: Modernized, harmonized regulation and market incentives are needed to reduce risks, speed repairs, and strengthen resilience in subsea cables across the Indo-Pacific.
